method: EO estimated from overall ownership base + GW38 captaincy share (Haaland 35%, Bruno 26% per web). League is 15-man; 6.7% = exactly 1 rival owner. User owns all 3 league template players.

template_core.note: MCI home vs Villa; top captain pick (35% C-share). EO inflated by armband. User owns and starts - protected.
2nd captain pick (26% C-share), 31 GI this season. User owns and starts - protected.
League template DEF, ~8ppg last 4, ARS. User owns and has as VC - protected.

differentials.why: Highest squad xPts (9.03), NFO MID, near-zero league ownership. User already owns - genuine low-EO ceiling and the best armband alternative (18.06 cap xpts).
6.7% league EO (1 of 15 rivals), Villa attacker - sub-8% ceiling differential if chasing rank.
6.7% league EO, Newcastle MID, high ceiling; not owned by user - acquisition target only.
6.7% league EO, ARS DEF with attacking + clean-sheet upside; not owned by user.

rank_risks.risk: Highest EO in pool. Not captaining vs the field is the single biggest rank threat. User owns/starts but captained Bowen instead - correctable.
User captained Bowen (9.66 cap xpts) while field captains Haaland/Bruno (12-18 cap xpts). Negative effective-captain EO swing - biggest correctable rank risk this GW.
High EO via captaincy; user owns/starts so spot is safe, only the armband decision is the leak.
